title: RBI Bank's Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
shortInfo: Reserve Bank of India (RBI) Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website RBI Official Website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the RBI Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: RBI Bank's Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Reserve Bank of India (RBI) Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website RBI Official Website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the RBI Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS degree from any university recognized by the Medical Council of India in the allopathic system of medicine, Post graduate degree in General Medicine, Minimum of two (02) years' experience practicing medicine in any hospital or clinic
qualification.details: MBBS degree from any university recognized by the Medical Council of India in the allopathic system of medicine. Minimum of two (02) years' experience practicing medicine in any hospital or clinic.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RBI Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RBI Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the RBI Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) recruitment is 16th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the BMC post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized university and have a minimum of two years of experience in practicing medicine in any hospital or clinic.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Bank's Medical Consultant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) post will receive a salary of Rs. 1000 per hour.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the BMC post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the BMC post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify the age limit for this position. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any age-related information.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the RBI BMC recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection process steps for the BMC role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) post includes an Interview, Medical Tests, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Which city and state is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781001.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
